# servicenow_css_include (Resource)

`servicenow_css_include` manages a cascading style sheet(CSS) within ServiceNow.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Manages a CSS include (external URL or service portal style sheet).
resource "servicenow_css_include" "example" {
  name   = "example-css-include"
  source = "url"
  url    = "https://example.com/style.css"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the CSS include.

### Optional

- `scope` (String) Associates a resource to a specific application ID in ServiceNow.
- `source` (String) Source type of the CSS include. Can be 'url' for an external link or 'local' for a service portal style sheet.
- `style_sheet_id` (String) The ID of the service portal style sheet to include.
- `url` (String) URL of the external CSS file when source is set to 'url'.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import using the sys_id of the record in ServiceNow.
terraform import servicenow_css_include.example <sys_id>
```
